transcript:
Speaker A: मला I will to learn English. माझं I having interview tomorrow. [I want to learn English. I have an interview tomorrow.]
Speaker B: Do you want to learn English speaking?
Speaker A: Yes... पण तुम्ही मराठीत बोलू शकता का? [Yes... but can you speak in Marathi?]
Speaker B: नक्की. तुम्हाला इंग्रजी शिकायची आहे का? [Sure. Do you want to learn English?]
Speaker A: हो, पण माझ्याकडे फार वेळ आणि पैसे नाहीयेत. आणि मी मराठी मीडियममधून शिकलेय. [Yes, but I don't have much time and money. And I studied in Marathi medium.]
Speaker B: MySivi ट्राय करा. रोज फक्त १०-१५ मिनिटे माझ्यासोबत English practice करा. आणि एका महिन्यात तुम्ही चांगली English बोलायला लागाल. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for just 10-15 minutes daily. And in one month, you will start speaking good English.]
Speaker A: पण तिथे teachers कोण असतील? [But who will be the teachers there?]
Speaker B: माझ्यासारखे AI teachers. Step-by-step English speaking शिकवतील. चुका लगेच correct करतील. आणि कधीही judge करणार नाहीत. [AI teachers like me. They will teach step-by-step English speaking. They will correct mistakes immediately. And they will never judge.]
Speaker A: Hmm... बरोबर वाटतंय. [Hmm... sounds right.]
Speaker B: MySivi ॲप डाउनलोड करा. ५० लाखांपेक्षा जास्त लोक रोज इथे English practice करतात. फक्त ₹१ च्या trial ने सुरुवात करा आणि तुमची English next level वर घेऊन जा. [Download MySivi app. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a ₹1 trial and take your English to the next level.]
Speaker A: Yes, मी लगेच MySivi ॲप डाउनलोड करते. [Yes, I will download the MySivi app right away.]

summary: A Marathi-speaking woman shares her struggle with English speaking before an interview. An AI avatar recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teachers who correct mistakes instantly. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a trial for just ₹1.
